title: Kerala University Time Table 2026

detail.title: Kerala University Time Table 2026
detail.short_info: Kerala University Time Table 2026 released for Second Semester B.Sc Electronics and BBA Mercy Chance examinations February 2026. Download the official timetable PDF at exams.keralauniversity.ac.in.

content.text: Kerala University has officially released the Kerala University Time Table 2026 for Second Semester examinations of B.Sc. Electronics and BBA programmes. These February 2026 examinations are for Career Related First Degree Programmes under CBCSS/CBCS for 2010, 2011 & 2012 Admission Mercy Chance (Prior to 2013 Admission) students. The detailed schedule is available on the official website - exams.keralauniversity.ac.in.
This Kerala University Time Table 2026 is specifically for mercy chance candidates. Students are advised to download the official timetable and prepare according to the schedule.
Download Kerala University Time Table 2026 PDF

links.text: Download Kerala University Time Table 2026 PDF

content.text: Kerala University has announced the February 2026 examination schedule for various undergraduate programmes. The Kerala University Time Table 2026 covers Second Semester exams for B.Sc Electronics and BBA under the mercy chance category for older admissions.

sections.heading: Kerala University Time Table 2026 Program Wise

content.text: The Kerala University Time Table 2026 provides the examination schedule for Second Semester programmes. These exams are conducted under Career Related First Degree Programme for specific admission batches. Students can view their respective course timetable from the official notification.
Here are the programmes covered in the Kerala University Time Table 2026:

sections.heading: How to Download Kerala University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the Kerala University Time Table 2026 from the official examination portal. Follow these simple steps to access your timetable.

items: Visit the official Kerala University exams website at exams.keralauniversity.ac.in.
Navigate to the Time Table or Examination Schedule section.
Look for the February 2026 examination notifications.
Click on the relevant link for B.Sc Electronics or BBA Second Semester timetable.
The PDF will open. Download and save it to your device.
Take a printout for ready reference during your exam preparation.

content.text: Keep checking the official website regularly for any updates regarding the Kerala University Time Table 2026.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Kerala University Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Kerala University Time Table 2026 notification contains all important information for the February 2026 examinations. Here are the key details mentioned in the document:

items: Programme names and course codes (B.Sc Electronics 340 & BBA 195)
Second Semester examination details
Examination month - February 2026
Admission years - 2010, 2011 & 2012 Mercy Chance
CBCSS / CBCS Group 2(b) scheme
Important instructions for candidates
Examination timing and guidelines.
